title: FLAVORO
desc: A modern food & snacks ordering platform with dynamic product listings, API-driven data handling,and a fully responsive React & SCSS interface.
desc2: Flavoro is a modern food ordering web application built using React and Redux, allowing users to browse products, manage cart state efficiently, and perform seamless CRUD operations with a mock backend using JSON Server. The app focuses on real-time state synchronization, smooth UI interactions, and scalable frontend architecture.
Outcome1: Built real-time cart sync using Redux for smooth state management.
Outcome2: Integrated a mock REST API with JSON Server to handle complete CRUD operations and simulate real backend workflows.
Outcome3: Enhanced user experience with fast, interactive UI updates.

title: REJOUICE
desc: A modern animation-focused web experience featuring smooth scrolling, high-performance transitions, and visually engaging interactions built with advanced frontend animation libraries.
desc2: A modern animation-driven web experience designed with smooth scrolling, high-performance transitions, and visually rich interactions. Built using GSAP and Locomotive Scroll, the project focuses on delivering seamless motion design and an immersive user experience inspired by contemporary creative websites.
Outcome1: Developed smooth scroll-based animations using GSAP & Locomotive Scroll for an engaging user experience.
Outcome2: Delivered visually rich UI with seamless motion transitions
Outcome3: Enhanced user engagement through interactive animation design

title: IMAGE EDITOR
desc: A browser-based image editing tool enabling real-time manipulation with interactive controls and custom JavaScript logic.
desc2: A dynamic image editing web application developed using pure JavaScript, allowing users to apply real-time filters, adjustments, and transformations. The project focuses on implementing core image processing logic from scratch while maintaining a responsive and user-friendly interface for seamless interaction.
Outcome1: Built real-time image editing features using pure JavaScript logic
Outcome2: Implemented filters, adjustments, and transformation controls for dynamic manipulation
Outcome3: Designed a responsive and intuitive UI for smooth user interaction
